reason: Manual finding added to frontier state

assertion.text: First Proof Problem 4 (complete failure across all systems, 2026-06-10) is visually-geometric in character; community comment on erdosproblems.com draws the parallel to Erdos #1041, where LLMs persistently produce flawed visual-intuition arguments. Evidence that highly-visual geometry remains a hard frontier class distinct from algebraically-flavored geometry (the unit-distance result). Source: erdosproblems.com comment + 1stproof.org report.

conditions.text: Manually added finding; requires evidence review before scientific use.

decision_reason: Bulk triage 2026-06-15: automated draft (watcher/extractor/ingest), not adjudicated; declining to keep the review gate meaningful. Recoverable from its Carina packet if needed.
